text:
うむ、特訓内容は合格だ。
順調に昇っているようだな
はるかな高みへの階段を。

精進を忘れず、驕りもせずに
愚直に努力を続けていれば
君ならばきっと辿り着けるだろう。

そう……誰もが夢見る
ランチャー使いの頂点へ。
それまで、頑

Yes, you've passed. And taken another
significant step on your journey.

I think, if you keep your head on straight
and don't lose focus or get too proud...
You'll really become something.

The peaks that so many dream of reaching--
those of true Launcher mastery.
Keep fighting! They're so close!
